title: Production Saving and Posting
description: Automates editing production vouchers — copies planned qty to produced, retrieves latest rates, checks cost vs price, saves and posts with password confirmation.

title: Invoice Posting
description: Finds all Post buttons in a table, lets you select rows by number or username, asks for a password once, then posts each selected invoice automatically.

title: Production Saving Only
description: Edits production vouchers by copying planned qty to produced, retrieves latest rates, alerts if cost exceeds sale price, then saves only — no posting.

title: Production Posting (Angular)
description: Posts production vouchers using Angular-compatible input setter. Handles Yes confirmation and specialPassword field, then clicks Post in the modal.
